meta.name: Fortune Coin Boost Classic
notes: Wild substitutes for all non-Bonus/Coin/Coin-Boost (PAR-Base r64..65)
Coin / Coin Boost feature: cascade-like Jackpot Bonus trigger
Free Spins: 3+ Bonus → 5 FS (11.2 avg incl. retriggers)
Jackpot Bonus pays GRAND/MAJOR/MINOR/MINI/MAXI on credit Coin/Boost mix

W4.10e — Symbol Replacement table @ r101 c15 (BG) and r111 c40 (FS) maps placeholders r01/r02/r03 → real symbols (Coin / Coin Boost / Lucky Kirin / Emperor) for the CE cascade respin pool. Per-step Symbol Replacement chain depth + respin tier weights are not published in the PAR sheet, so the engine sources the multiway/scatter RTP from breakdown (deterministic).
